rationale: Educ. Code §11.174 governs school district–charter school campus operating contracts. It contains no reference to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal values, so the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change does not conflict.
quote: Sec. 11.174. CONTRACT REGARDING OPERATION OF DISTRICT CAMPUS.
_note: No conflict; rule is unrelated to homestead exemptions.
